reply:
[[BLOCK:p_0]]
Lecturer Profile

[[BLOCK:p_1]]
Gong Wen

[[BLOCK:p_2]]
Ph.D. in Psychology (1997, Psychometrics (心理测量学)), Beijing Normal University

[[BLOCK:p_3]]
Associate Professor, Business School, Beijing Technology and Business University

[[BLOCK:p_5]]
Background: In the early 1990s, founded one of China's earliest consulting firms specializing in Talent Assessment (人才评估), introducing Western theories and tools of Talent Assessment to support domestic talent selection. Joined the Founder Group in 2000 and led the development of China's first network-based psychological assessment tool, the "北大方正专业评估系统," in 2002. For over a decade, this product has maintained the highest market share in China as a College Entrance Exam Guidance Tool (高考升学指导工具) and was the first profitable online psychological assessment tool in the country. Returned to academia in 2005, balancing teaching responsibilities with roles as a corporate management consultant, external lecturer, and Executive Coaching (高管教练) professional.

[[BLOCK:p_7]]
Areas of Expertise: Dedicated to applying Positive Psychology (积极心理学) theories to corporate management, particularly in Human Resource Management (人力资源管理) practices. Possesses over 30 years of hands-on experience in Talent Assessment and selection, learning and development, and Leadership Development (领导力开发). Published more than 20 papers in core journals such as "北大商业评论," "China and Foreign Management," "China Human Resource Development," "Future and Development," and "Enterprise Management," with several papers indexed by CSSCI.

[[BLOCK:p_9]]
Courses Taught: Teaches undergraduate, academic graduate, and Master of Business Administration (MBA) (工商管理硕士) students in courses such as "Management," "Organizational Behavior (组织行为学)," "Human Resource Management (人力资源管理)," "Self-Awareness and Self-Management," "Selected Readings from Zizhi Tongjian," and "Leadership and Team Empowerment."
